reference: Welcome to the clinic. It appears you may be experiencing angina. Please undergo an electrocardiogram and a stress echocardiography, along with a blood pressure and lipid profile test, and a chest X-ray. Take the appropriate medications according to the reports. Avoid fast and fried foods, and maintain a proper weight.
